name: hookify
description: Codex-compatible hookify runner that preserves hookify markdown rules through a CLI and skill.

interface.shortDescription: Reuse hookify markdown rules from Codex through a CLI and skill
interface.longDescription: Hookify for Codex preserves the existing hookify rule format and evaluates those rules through a repo-local CLI. It cannot inject native Codex hooks, but it does let you keep one markdown rule set across Claude and Codex-oriented workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create or refine hookify rules and show how to run them from Codex-compatible workflows
